scripts.review:core-rule:prepare: pnpm run review:build-fill-decisions && pnpm run review:build-fill-blockers && pnpm run audit:core-rule-review-state
scripts.review:core-rule:verify: pnpm run review:core-rule:prepare && pnpm run seed:p0 -- packages/reference-data/data/p0-foundation --dry-run && pnpm run audit:core-rule-db-state && pnpm run audit:core-rule-candidate-smoke && pnpm run audit:core-rule-analysis-smoke && pnpm run audit:foundation-p0-seed && pnpm run audit:foundation-operational-readiness
scripts.review:core-rule:apply-db: pnpm run review:core-rule:prepare && SEED_CONCURRENCY=2 pnpm run seed:p0 -- packages/reference-data/data/p0-foundation && pnpm run audit:core-rule-db-state
scripts.collect:university-admission-gap-homepag: for y in 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 2027; do pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data collect:university-admission-gap-homepage-artifacts -- --year=$y --delay-ms=50 --timeout-ms=15000; done

for y in 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 2027; do pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data collect:university-admission-gap-homepage-file-attachments -- --year=$y --attachment-candidates=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/university_admission_attachment_candidates_${y}_gap_homepage_links.csv --delay-ms=50 --timeout-ms=15000; done
scripts.extract:university-admission:gap-homepag: out=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/extracted-gap-homepage-file-attachments; suffix=gap_homepage_links_direct_file_file_download_route; mkdir -p $out; for y in 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 2027; do manifest=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/university_admission_attachment_artifact_manifest_${y}_${suffix}.jsonl; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:workbooks -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:workbook-rows -- --year=$y --workbook-sheets=$out/university_admission_workbook_sheets_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:pdfs -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:pdf-snippets -- --year=$y --pdf-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_pdf_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:hwps -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:hwp-snippets -- --year=$y --hwp-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_hwp_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:office-docs -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:office-doc-snippets -- --year=$y --office-document-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_office_document_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data build:university-admission:evidence-index -- --year=$y --output-dir=$out --pdf-snippets=$out/university_admission_pdf_snippets_${y}.jsonl --hwp-snippets=$out/university_admission_hwp_snippets_${y}.jsonl --office-document-snippets=$out/university_admission_office_document_snippets_${y}.jsonl --workbook-sheets=$out/university_admission_workbook_sheets_manifest_${y}.jsonl --workbook-row-candidates=$out/university_admission_workbook_row_candidates_${y}.jsonl --low-text-pdf-page-images=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_images_${y}.jsonl --low-text-pdf-page-ocr-evidence=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_ocr_evidence_index_${y}.jsonl; done; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data build:university-admission:promotion-queue -- --input-glob "$out/university_admission_evidence_index_*.jsonl" --output-dir=$out
scripts.render:university-admission:gap-homepage: out=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/extracted-gap-homepage-file-attachments; for y in 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 2027; do pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data render:university-admission:low-text-pdf-images -- --year=$y --pdf-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_pdf_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; done
scripts.ocr:university-admission:gap-homepage-fi: out=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/extracted-gap-homepage-file-attachments; for y in 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 2027; do pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data ocr:university-admission:low-text-pdf-images -- --year=$y --page-image-manifest=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_images_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out --jobs=8; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data build:university-admission:evidence-index -- --year=$y --output-dir=$out --pdf-snippets=$out/university_admission_pdf_snippets_${y}.jsonl --hwp-snippets=$out/university_admission_hwp_snippets_${y}.jsonl --office-document-snippets=$out/university_admission_office_document_snippets_${y}.jsonl --workbook-sheets=$out/university_admission_workbook_sheets_manifest_${y}.jsonl --workbook-row-candidates=$out/university_admission_workbook_row_candidates_${y}.jsonl --low-text-pdf-page-images=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_images_${y}.jsonl --low-text-pdf-page-ocr-evidence=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_ocr_evidence_index_${y}.jsonl; done; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data build:university-admission:promotion-queue -- --input-glob "$out/university_admission_evidence_index_*.jsonl" --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data summarize:university-admission-gap-homepage-file-docs
scripts.extract:university-admission:zip-entry-d: pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:zip-entries:all-public; out=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/extracted-zip-entries; mkdir -p $out; for y in 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 2027; do manifest=packages/reference-data/data/public/university-admission-sites/university_admission_zip_entry_artifact_manifest_${y}.jsonl; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:workbooks -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:workbook-rows -- --year=$y --workbook-sheets=$out/university_admission_workbook_sheets_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:pdfs -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:pdf-snippets -- --year=$y --pdf-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_pdf_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:hwps -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:hwp-snippets -- --year=$y --hwp-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_hwp_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data render:university-admission:low-text-pdf-images -- --year=$y --pdf-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_pdf_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data ocr:university-admission:low-text-pdf-images -- --year=$y --page-image-manifest=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_images_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out --jobs=8; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:office-docs -- --year=$y --manifest=$manifest --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data extract:university-admission:office-doc-snippets -- --year=$y --office-document-source-manifest=$out/university_admission_office_document_sources_manifest_${y}.jsonl --output-dir=$out; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data build:university-admission:evidence-index -- --year=$y --output-dir=$out --pdf-snippets=$out/university_admission_pdf_snippets_${y}.jsonl --hwp-snippets=$out/university_admission_hwp_snippets_${y}.jsonl --office-document-snippets=$out/university_admission_office_document_snippets_${y}.jsonl --workbook-sheets=$out/university_admission_workbook_sheets_manifest_${y}.jsonl --workbook-row-candidates=$out/university_admission_workbook_row_candidates_${y}.jsonl --low-text-pdf-page-images=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_images_${y}.jsonl --low-text-pdf-page-ocr-evidence=$out/university_admission_low_text_pdf_page_ocr_evidence_index_${y}.jsonl; done; pnpm --filter @pacer/reference-data build:university-admission:promotion-queue -- --input-glob "$out/university_admission_evidence_index_*.jsonl" --output-dir=$out
